all.Pedal-Assist: Five levels of pedal-assist and an ergonomic thumb throttle deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.**
all.Thumb Throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.
all.Color LCD Display: A backlit, heads-up color LCD display with a USB-A port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.
all.Motor Controller: 24 amp controller is IP-65 rated and potted for weather proofing and thermal management.
all.Motor: A Sutto 750W rear hub-motor (1310W Peak) with 85Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. New Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter*, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power.
all.Battery: Available with a Long-Range 48V 14ah (672 Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 to power your ride for up to 60 miles, respectively.†‡ The Lectric ONE is also certified to UL 2849.
all.Bike Weight: Total bike weight is 48lbs with the 7lb battery removed.
all.City Tires: 20x2.5'' city tires featuring a reflective strip are equipped with 3mm Hippo Skin with an Aramid Floc Breaker. Shark Skin Protection on the sidewall offers pinch flat protection and all-weather reliability. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.
all.Front Fork: This rigid fork is fully aluminum and ultra lightweight, featuring a thru axle dropout.
all.Thru Axle: The front wheel features a Thru Axle wheel attachment system for tool-free installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and light-weight transport.
all.Pinion Gearbox: With the Pinion C1.6i six-speed sealed weatherproof gearbox, shifting is done at the touch of a button – quickly, ergonomically, and intuitively. The system shifts while riding, while stationary, and while under load.
all.Pinion Smart.Shift App: All gearbox functions are combined in the Pinion Smart.Shift App, which can be easily paired and customized to suit your preferences. A pre-select feature automatically sets the rider's gears, allowing effortless auto-shifts, while a convenient start-select feature lets riders dictate their starting gear ahead of time, allowing for split-second starts.
all.Cranks: Pinion aluminum cranks are 165mm in length.
all.Belt Drive: Gates CDC 113-tooth Carbon Drive Belt System is lightweight and carbon fiber-reinforced. The belt’s performance is nearly maintenance-free while providing a chainless drivetrain that’s clean, quiet, smooth, and strong.
all.Gates Carbon Drive App: The Gates app is used to measure belt tension sonically. The belt can be plucked like a guitar string while the app uses the microphone on a mobile device to read the vibration frequency and compares it to a chart to determine if any adjustments are needed.
all.Belt Cogs: A Gates CDC 24-tooth steel rear belt cog is paired with an aluminum CDX 39-tooth front cog providing a ratio-optimized performance to accommodate a wide range of speeds.
all.Brakes: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes and 180mm rotors (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.
all.Lectric PWR™: Lectric's Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation (PWR) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting, instead of limiting the assistance by speed alone. Learn more about PWR here.
all.PAS Sensor: Lectric's PWR™ allows the rider to control the eBike's output with no additional effort so that a torque sensor is not necessary for smooth rides. Instead, the Lectric ONE has a simply designed and affordable cadence sensor with 96 magnets simulated so you can reach high speeds with ease.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and a brake-activated taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The Lectric ONE comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging.
all.Telescoping Seat Post: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
all.Adjustable Handlebar Stem: Easily adjustable handlebar stem riser includes a quick-release lever to comfortably adjust your handlebar reach to your liking; bring your handlebars toward you or push them further back.
all.Removable Pedals: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.
all.Lock-on Grips: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sportier look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
all.Kickstand: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.
all.Accessory Mounting Points: The frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.
all.Hidden Cable Routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
all.Frame: 6000-series-aluminum frame is sturdy yet lightweight. The chainstays feature vertical dropouts and speciality designed splits on each side for easy access to the belt drive.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
all.One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply attach the quick-release pedals, unfold the handlebar stem, and install the front wheel via the thru axle.
all.Safety Certified: The Lectric ONE is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the ONE's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

features.detail: Lectric's PWR™ allows the rider to control the eBike's output with no additional effort so that a torque sensor is not necessary for smooth rides. Instead, the Lectric ONE has a simply designed and affordable cadence sensor with 96 magnets simulated so you can reach high speeds with ease.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and a brake-activated taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Charging
features.detail: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The Lectric ONE comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: An adjustable and removable seat post allows riders to reach a range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Easily adjustable handlebar stem riser includes a quick-release lever to comfortably adjust your handlebar reach to your liking; bring your handlebars toward you or push them further back.

features.name: Removable Pedals
features.detail: Quick-release pedals easily detach from the bike for compact transport.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sportier look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Accessory Mounting Points
features.detail: The frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: 6000-series-aluminum frame is sturdy yet lightweight. The chainstays feature vertical dropouts and speciality designed splits on each side for easy access to the belt drive.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply attach the quick-release pedals, unfold the handlebar stem, and install the front wheel via the thru axle.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: The Lectric ONE is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the ONE's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

all.Pedal-Assist: Five levels of pedal-assist and a twist throttle deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1 or 2 eBike.**
all.Twist-Grip Throttle: A half-twist throttle is easily engaged with a flick of the wrist to deliver pure power on demand.
all.Color LCD Display: A backlit, color LCD display with a USB-A port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.
all.Battery: Available with a Standard or Long-Range 48V lithium-ion battery (375Wh or 672Wh) certified to UL 2271 to power your ride for up to 80 miles, respectively.*† The Lectric XP Lite is also certified to UL 2849.
all.Motor: A 300W rear hub-motor (819W Peak) with 28Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter‡, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power.
all.Motor Controller: 15 amp controller is IP-65 rated with built in thermal sensors to eliminate burn-out.
all.Brakes: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes and 180mm rotors (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.
all.Tires: 20x2.5'' slick tires featuring a reflective strip are equipped with 3mm Hippo Skin with an Aramid Floc Breaker. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.
all.Bike Weight: Total bike weight is 41lbs with the 8lb battery removed making this is one of the most portable eBikes on the market.
all.Crankset: Forged aluminum, 52-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.
all.Drivetrain: 52 x 16 tooth single speed drivetrain makes riding efficient and seamless.
all.Chain: KMC Z1 steel chain offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.
all.Lectric PWR™: Lectric's Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation (PWR) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting, instead of limiting the assistance by speed alone. Learn more about PWR here. Prefer full wattage while you ride? Access the advanced settings of your display to toggle off PWR Programming.
all.PAS Sensor: Lectric's PWR™ allows the rider to control the eBike's output with no additional effort so that a torque sensor is not necessary for smooth rides. Instead, the Lectric XP Lite has a simply designed and affordable cadence sensor.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP Lite comes standard with a 2amp charger for 2-4 hour charging.
all.Size Adjustable: An adjustable and removable seat post and a telescoping handlebar stem allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
all.Grips: Soft durometer ergonomic grips add comfort so you can ride longer. Removable caps on the end allow for various accessory add-on.
all.Handlebars: Newly added BMX-style handlebars are sturdy, comfortable, and offer more opportunities for customizing your ride with accessories.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sportier look and can be angle adjusted.
all.Folding Capabilities: A foldable design at both the handlebar stem and main frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space.
all.Kickstand: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.
all.Folding Pedals: Push-fold pedals are easily compressed for compact transport.
all.Accessory Mounting Points: The frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.

all.PAS Sensor: Lectric's PWR™ allows the rider to control the eBike's output with no additional effort so that a torque sensor is not necessary for smooth rides. Instead, the Lectric XP Lite has a simply designed and affordable cadence sensor.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a headlamp and taillight powered by the battery allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP Lite comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging.
all.Size Adjustable: An adjustable and removable seat post and a telescoping handlebar stem allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
all.Grips: Soft durometer ergonomic grips add comfort so you can ride longer. Removable caps on the end allow for various accessory add-on.
all.Handlebars: Newly added BMX-style handlebars are sturdy, comfortable, and offer more opportunities for customizing your ride with accessories.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle compliments a sportier look and can be angle adjusted.
all.Folding Capabilities: A foldable design at both the handlebar stem and main frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space.
all.Kickstand: A heavy-duty side-sweeping kickstand located near the chain stay keeps the eBike upright.
all.Folding Pedals: Push-fold pedals are easily compressed for compact transport.
all.Accessory Mounting Points: The frame features multiple mounting points throughout the eBike for various accessory combinations.
all.Front Fork: Rigid Steel Fork with a threadless headset.
all.One Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem and handlebars, and unfold the pedals.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
all.Safety Certified: The Lectric XP Lite is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP Lite's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

features.name: Pedal-Assist
features.detail: Five levels of pedal-assist and a twist throttle deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1 or 2 eBike.**

features.name: Twist-Grip Throttle
features.detail: A half-twist throttle is easily engaged with a flick of the wrist to deliver pure power on demand.

features.name: Color LCD Display
features.detail: A backlit, color LCD display with a USB-A port provides trip and battery intelligence on the go. IP-65 rated electrical components ensure greater water and dust resistance.

features.name: Battery
features.detail: Available with a Standard or Long-Range 48V lithium-ion battery (375Wh or 672Wh) certified to UL 2271 to power your ride for up to 80 miles, respectively.*† The Lectric XP Lite is also certified to UL 2849.

features.name: Motor
features.detail: A 300W rear hub-motor (819W Peak) with 28Nm of torque delivers power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology is 400% quieter‡, delivering a hushed motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 15 amp controller is IP-65 rated with built in thermal sensors to eliminate burn-out.

features.name: Brakes
features.detail: Hydraulic mineral oil brakes and 180mm rotors (1.8mm thick) offer ultimate stopping power and peace of mind in wet or dry conditions.

features.name: Tires
features.detail: 20x2.5'' slick tires featuring a reflective strip are equipped with 3mm Hippo Skin with an Aramid Floc Breaker. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires at no additional cost.

features.name: Bike Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 41lbs with the 8lb battery removed making this is one of the most portable eBikes on the market.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 52-tooth chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: 52 x 16 tooth single speed drivetrain makes riding efficient and seamless.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: KMC Z1 steel chain offers consistent tension and secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: Lectric PWR™
features.detail: Lectric's Pedal Assist Wattage Regulation (PWR) programming allows for an improved Pedal Assist experience by assisting the rider up to a certain power level for each PAS setting, instead of limiting the assistance by speed alone. Learn more about PWR here. Prefer full wattage while you ride? Access the advanced settings of your display to toggle off PWR Programming.

features.name: Charging

features.name: Kickstand

features.name: Folding Pedals

features.name: Accessory Mounting Points

features.name: Front Fork
features.detail: Rigid Steel Fork with a threadless headset.

features.name: Frame
features.detail: 6000-series-aluminum frame is sturdy yet lightweight.

Long-Range Battery + Gates Carbon Belt Drive +$100 Sold Out

all.5 Riding Modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1 or 2 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
all.Beginner Preset: If you haven’t been on a bike in a while, the XP Trike2 750 comes with a power-limiting feature to slow acceleration and limits max speed to 5 mph in riding modes Eco and Tour. Once you get comfortable, you can unlock faster settings.
all.Twist Throttle: A half-twist throttle located on the right handlebar delivers pure power on demand.
all.Suspension Fork: The Cloud 50 suspension front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and cloud-soft ride. Adjust the preload or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.
all.Stealth M24 Motor: A 500W rear hub motor (1092W peak) with 65 Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology ensures a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.
all.Battery: A removable 48V, 17.5Ah (840 Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 70 miles on a single charge.** The XP Trike2 750 is also certified to UL 2849.†
all.Keyless Riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.
all.Rear Rack: A rear rack integrated into the bike frame holds up to 75 lbs. and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations.
all.TFT LCD Display: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.
all.Redesigned Frame: The XP Trike2 750 is crafted with a hydroformed 6000-series aluminum frame that's ultra-strong and up to 30% lighter than comparable steel frames. The reinforced downtube and re-engineered geometry—featuring a set-back seat tube and lowered rear rack—enhance stability and comfort, especially at higher speeds or on uneven paths.
all.Tires—with Slime!: Puncture-resistant 20” x 2.5” slim tires allow you to turn on a dime, while an updated tread pattern improves efficiency. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.
all.Pedal-Assist Sensor: A 12-magnet cadence sensor paired with our in-house-designed wattage regulation programming will give you controlled power distribution and a range-optimized riding experience.
all.Drivetrain: A 16-tooth single-speed freewheel paired with a forged aluminum, 36-tooth custom chainring makes riding efficient and is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.
all.Chain: A KMC Z8 steel chain offers consistent tension for a secure performance throughout your ride.
all.Hydraulic Brakes: Get ultimate stopping power with Star Union hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Turn Signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.
all.Parking Brakes: Lock your trike tires while they aren't in use to keep your ride secure with our front and rear parking brakes. Blue levers on both sides of the handlebars can be micro-adjusted from a locked or unlocked position and engaged with a pull from the brake lever.
all.Differential Axle: The 2-wheel-drive, all-wheel braking system is made possible by the open, dual-differential axle. Both the motor and the stationary rotor are centered on the axle, providing power and brakes to both rear wheels. This design ensures stability by creating a balanced center of gravity.
all.Fenders: Polypropylene fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.
all.Pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum pedals with protruding grip pins improve foot traction for an optimal experience.
all.Lock-on Grips: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
all.Adjustable Handlebar Stem: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new 9-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
all.Telescoping Seat Post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.
all.Fully Foldable: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the front wheel, battery, and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.
all.Weight: Total bike weight is 79 lbs. without the battery installed. The XP Trike2 750 long-range battery weighs 9lbs.
all.Easy Charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP Trike2 750 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 7-9 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in as little as 3.5 hours.
all.Motor Controller: 20amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.
all.Thru Axle: The front wheel features a thru-axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and lightweight transport.
all.Hidden Cable Routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable. Carefully crafted and engineered so you won’t have to lift any components out of the box.
all.One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply unfold the stem assembly and frame, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the front wheel and display screen. Non-essential riding components such as fenders, headlights, and other accessories can be installed at your convenience.
all.Safety Certified: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP Trike2 750 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the lithium-ion battery on the XP Trike2 750 is certified to UL 2271.
all.Torque Sensor: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
all.Pick your Pedal Response: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque or cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.

General Info.Fully Foldable: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the front wheel, battery, and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.
General Info.Weight: Total bike weight is 79 lbs. without the battery installed. The XP Trike2 750 long-range battery weighs 9lbs.
General Info.Pick your Pedal Response: Choose between responsive pedaling vs. standard pedaling with an easy adjustment to the settings, switching between a torque or cadence sensor. The torque sensor offers a more natural, smooth feel with intuitive power that responds to your pedal pressure. The cadence sensor provides power with each revolution of the pedals, making it a great option for beginners or anyone looking for a more relaxed ride.

all.Stealth M24 Motor: A 500W rear hub motor (1092W peak) with 65 Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology ensures a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.
all.Battery: A removable 48V, 13Ah (624 Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 50 miles on a single charge.** The XP Trike2 is also certified to UL 2849.†
all.Keyless Riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.
all.Rear Rack: A rear rack integrated into the bike frame holds up to 75 lbs. and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations.
all.TFT LCD Display: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.
all.Redesigned Frame: The XP Trike2 is crafted with a hydroformed 6000-series aluminum frame that's ultra-strong and up to 30% lighter than comparable steel frames. The reinforced downtube and re-engineered geometry—featuring a set-back seat tube and lowered rear rack—enhance stability and comfort, especially at higher speeds or on uneven paths.
all.Tires—with Slime!: Puncture-resistant 20” x 2.5” slim tires allow you to turn on a dime, while an updated tread pattern improves efficiency. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.
all.Pedal-Assist Sensor: A 12-magnet cadence sensor paired with our in-house-designed wattage regulation programming will give you controlled power distribution and a range-optimized riding experience.
all.Drivetrain: A 16-tooth single-speed freewheel paired with a forged aluminum, 36-tooth custom chainring makes riding efficient and is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.
all.Chain: A KMC Z8 steel chain offers consistent tension for a secure performance throughout your ride.
all.Hydraulic Brakes: Get ultimate stopping power with Star Union hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Turn Signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.
all.Parking Brakes: Lock your trike tires while they aren't in use to keep your ride secure with our front and rear parking brakes. Blue levers on both sides of the handlebars can be micro-adjusted from a locked or unlocked position and engaged with a pull from the brake lever.
all.Differential Axle: The 2-wheel-drive, all-wheel braking system is made possible by the open, dual-differential axle. Both the motor and the stationary rotor are centered on the axle, providing power and brakes to both rear wheels. This design ensures stability by creating a balanced center of gravity.
all.Fenders: Polypropylene fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.
all.Pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum pedals with protruding grip pins improve foot traction for an optimal experience.
all.Lock-on Grips: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
all.Adjustable Handlebar Stem: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new 9-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
all.Telescoping Seat Post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.
all.Fully Foldable: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the front wheel, battery, and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.
all.Weight: Total bike weight is 79 lbs. without the battery installed. The XP Trike2 standard battery weighs 7lbs.
all.Easy Charging: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP Trike2 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 5-7 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the standard battery in as little as 3 hours.
all.Motor Controller: 20amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.
all.Thru Axle: The front wheel features a thru-axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and lightweight transport.
all.Hidden Cable Routing: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable. Carefully crafted and engineered so you won’t have to lift any components out of the box.
all.One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply unfold the stem assembly and frame, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the front wheel and display screen. Non-essential riding components such as fenders, headlights, and other accessories can be installed at your convenience.
all.Safety Certified: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP Trike2 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP Trike2's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

features.name: 5 Riding Modes
features.detail: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1 or 2 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.

features.name: Beginner Preset
features.detail: If you haven’t been on a bike in a while, the XP Trike2 comes with a power-limiting feature to slow acceleration and limits max speed to 5 mph in riding modes Eco and Tour. Once you get comfortable, you can unlock faster settings.

features.name: Twist Throttle
features.detail: A half-twist throttle located on the right handlebar delivers pure power on demand.

features.name: Suspension Fork
features.detail: The Cloud 50 suspension front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and cloud-soft ride. Adjust the preload or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.

features.name: Stealth M24 Motor
features.detail: A 500W rear hub motor (1092W peak) with 65 Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology ensures a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Battery
features.detail: A removable 48V, 13Ah (624 Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 50 miles on a single charge.** The XP Trike2 is also certified to UL 2849.†

features.name: Keyless Riding
features.detail: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only.

features.name: Rear Rack
features.detail: A rear rack integrated into the bike frame holds up to 75 lbs. and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations.

features.name: TFT LCD Display
features.detail: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port provides trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.

features.name: Redesigned Frame
features.detail: The XP Trike2 is crafted with a hydroformed 6000-series aluminum frame that's ultra-strong and up to 30% lighter than comparable steel frames. The reinforced downtube and re-engineered geometry—featuring a set-back seat tube and lowered rear rack—enhance stability and comfort, especially at higher speeds or on uneven paths.

features.name: Tires—with Slime!
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 20” x 2.5” slim tires allow you to turn on a dime, while an updated tread pattern improves efficiency. The sidewall features reflective strips for better visibility at night. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.

features.name: Pedal-Assist Sensor
features.detail: A 12-magnet cadence sensor paired with our in-house-designed wattage regulation programming will give you controlled power distribution and a range-optimized riding experience.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: A 16-tooth single-speed freewheel paired with a forged aluminum, 36-tooth custom chainring makes riding efficient and is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain offers consistent tension for a secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: Hydraulic Brakes
features.detail: Get ultimate stopping power with Star Union hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

features.name: Parking Brakes
features.detail: Lock your trike tires while they aren't in use to keep your ride secure with our front and rear parking brakes. Blue levers on both sides of the handlebars can be micro-adjusted from a locked or unlocked position and engaged with a pull from the brake lever.

features.name: Differential Axle
features.detail: The 2-wheel-drive, all-wheel braking system is made possible by the open, dual-differential axle. Both the motor and the stationary rotor are centered on the axle, providing power and brakes to both rear wheels. This design ensures stability by creating a balanced center of gravity.

features.name: Fenders

features.name: Pedals
features.detail: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum pedals with protruding grip pins improve foot traction for an optimal experience.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new 9-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

features.name: Fully Foldable
features.detail: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the front wheel, battery, and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.

features.name: Weight

features.name: Easy Charging
features.detail: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. features.name: Motor Controller

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a thru-axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and lightweight transport.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable. Carefully crafted and engineered so you won’t have to lift any components out of the box.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Glacier Blue

features.name: One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply unfold the stem assembly and frame, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the front wheel and display screen. Non-essential riding components such as fenders, headlights, and other accessories can be installed at your convenience.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP Trike2 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP Trike2's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: A 16-tooth single-speed freewheel paired with a forged aluminum, 36-tooth custom chainring makes riding efficient and is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain offers consistent tension for a secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: Hydraulic Brakes
features.detail: Get ultimate stopping power with Star Union hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.

features.name: Differential Axle
features.detail: The 2-wheel-drive, all-wheel braking system is made possible by the open, dual-differential axle. Both the motor and the stationary rotor are centered on the axle, providing power and brakes to both rear wheels. This design ensures stability by creating a balanced center of gravity.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

features.name: Parking Brakes
features.detail: Lock your trike tires while they aren't in use to keep your ride secure with our front and rear parking brakes. Blue levers on both sides of the handlebars can be micro-adjusted from a locked or unlocked position and engaged with a pull from the brake lever.

features.name: Fenders
features.detail: Polypropylene fenders protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.

features.name: Pedals
features.detail: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum pedals with protruding grip pins improve foot traction for an optimal experience.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new 9-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

features.name: Fully Foldable
features.detail: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the front wheel, battery, and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.

features.name: Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 79 lbs. without the battery installed. The XP Trike2 750 long-range battery weighs 9lbs.

features.name: Easy Charging
features.detail: An external charging port provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP Trike2 750 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 7-9 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in as little as 3.5 hours.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: Thru Axle
features.detail: The front wheel features a thru-axle wheel attachment system for a quick and easy installation. This feature ensures a straight wheel, consistent brake rotor alignment, and handling stability. Remove the wheel in minutes for an easy and lightweight transport.

features.name: Hidden Cable Routing
features.detail: The down tube of the frame houses the main cables for a premium experience at no extra cost.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable. Carefully crafted and engineered so you won’t have to lift any components out of the box.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Lavender Haze

features.name: One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply unfold the stem assembly and frame, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the front wheel and display screen. Non-essential riding components such as fenders, headlights, and other accessories can be installed at your convenience.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP Trike2 750 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the lithium-ion battery on the XP Trike2 750 is certified to UL 2271.

performance_options: Upgraded Motor & Battery +$0 50% more power, 30% more range

all.5 Riding Modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
all.Thumb Throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.
all.Stealth M24 Motor: A 500W rear hub motor (1092W peak) with 55Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.
all.Battery: An integrated & removable 48V, 10.4Ah (500Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 50 miles on a single charge.** The XP4 is also certified to UL 2849.† Removing the battery from the frame is a breeze with the side-facing key port location.
all.New: Keyless Riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only. We’ve listened to our loyal riders, and you can now ride key-free!
all.Rear Rack: A new rear rack design integrated into the bike frame holds up to 150lbs and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations. Add a LevelUp Rack (sold separately) on top of the rack to unlock even more accessory combinations!
all.Co-Pilot Capable: The LevelUp Rack (sold separately) can be added to the integrated rear rack and has a built-in mounting window to easily install children's seats like the Thule Maxx Yepp Seat. If they have outgrown a standard child seat, our Buddy Seat (sold separately) contains an open padded seat, handlebars, and foot pegs that allow you to bring them along for the ride!***
all.TFT LCD Display: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port. You’ll find trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.
all.Tires—with Slime!: Puncture-resistant 20” x 3” tires are perfect for mixed terrains and make for a smoother ride. The new custom tread pattern has less rolling resistance for better power efficiency and delivers an ultra-quiet experience. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.
all.Torque Sensor: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
all.Drivetrain: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.
all.Crankset: Forged aluminum, 56-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.
all.Chain: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.
all.602 Hydraulic Brakes: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.
all.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
all.Turn Signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.
all.Suspension Fork: The front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and comfortable ride. Adjust the tension or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.
all.Folding Kickstand: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.
all.Fenders: Polypropylene fenders with a flared tail protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.
all.Quick-Release Pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.
all.Lock-on Grips: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
all.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
all.Adjustable Handlebar Stem: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new zero-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
all.Telescoping Seat Post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.
all.Fully Foldable: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the pedals and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.
all.Weight: Total bike weight is 62lbs without the battery installed. The XP4 long-range battery weighs 9lbs.
all.Easy Charging: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP4 750 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 7-9 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in as little as 3.5 hours.
all.Fully Redesigned Frame: The newly designed, more aesthetic XP4 frame is lightweight and features sturdy 6000 series aluminum with mounting points for various accessory combinations.
all.Motor Controller: 20amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.
all.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
all.One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the pedals and display screen.
all.Tested for Durability: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XP4 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.
all.Safety Certified: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP4 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP4's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

all.Motor Controller: 20amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: 5 Riding Modes
features.detail: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Stealth M24 Motor
features.detail: A 500W rear hub motor (1092W peak) with 55Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Battery
features.detail: An integrated & removable 48V, 10.4Ah (500Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 50 miles on a single charge.** The XP4 is also certified to UL 2849.† Removing the battery from the frame is a breeze with the side-facing key port location.

features.name: New: Keyless Riding
features.detail: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only. We’ve listened to our loyal riders, and you can now ride key-free!

features.name: Rear Rack
features.detail: A new rear rack design integrated into the bike frame holds up to 150lbs and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations. Add a LevelUp Rack (sold separately) on top of the rack to unlock even more accessory combinations!

features.name: Co-Pilot Capable
features.detail: The LevelUp Rack (sold separately) can be added to the integrated rear rack and has a built-in mounting window to easily install children's seats like the Thule Maxx Yepp Seat. If they have outgrown a standard child seat, our Buddy Seat (sold separately) contains an open padded seat, handlebars, and foot pegs that allow you to bring them along for the ride!***

features.name: TFT LCD Display
features.detail: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port. You’ll find trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.

features.name: Tires—with Slime!
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 20” x 3” tires are perfect for mixed terrains and make for a smoother ride. The new custom tread pattern has less rolling resistance for better power efficiency and delivers an ultra-quiet experience. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.

features.name: Torque Sensor
features.detail: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 56-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: 602 Hydraulic Brakes
features.detail: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

features.name: Suspension Fork
features.detail: The front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and comfortable ride. Adjust the tension or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.

features.name: Folding Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Fenders
features.detail: Polypropylene fenders with a flared tail protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.

features.name: Quick-Release Pedals
features.detail: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new zero-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

features.name: Fully Foldable
features.detail: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the pedals and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.

features.name: Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 62lbs without the battery installed. The XP4 battery weighs 7lbs.

features.name: Easy Charging
features.detail: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP4 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 4-6 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the standard battery in as little as 2 hours.

features.name: Fully Redesigned Frame
features.detail: The newly designed, more aesthetic XP4 frame is lightweight and features sturdy 6000 series aluminum with mounting points for various accessory combinations.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 20amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.name: Color
features.detail: Tempest Grey

features.name: One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly
features.detail: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the pedals and display screen.

features.name: Tested for Durability
features.detail: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XP4 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP4 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP4's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

performance_options: Upgraded Motor & Battery +$300 50% more power, 68% more range

physical.Safety Lights: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.
physical.Turn Signals: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.
physical.Suspension Fork: The front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and comfortable ride. Adjust the tension or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.
physical.Folding Kickstand: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.
physical.Fenders: Polypropylene fenders with a flared tail protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.
physical.Quick-Release Pedals: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.
physical.Lock-on Grips: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.
physical.Saddle: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.
physical.Adjustable Handlebar Stem: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new zero-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.
physical.Telescoping Seat Post: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.
physical.Fully Foldable: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the pedals and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.
physical.Weight: Total bike weight is 62lbs without the battery installed. The XP4 long-range battery weighs 9lbs.
physical.Fully Redesigned Frame: The newly designed, more aesthetic XP4 frame is lightweight and features sturdy 6000 series aluminum with mounting points for various accessory combinations.
physical.Green Packaging: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.
physical.One-Minute, Tool-Free Assembly: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the pedals and display screen.
physical.Tested for Durability: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XP4 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.
physical.Safety Certified: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP4 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP4's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.

technical.5 Riding Modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.
technical.Thumb Throttle: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.
technical.Stealth M24 Motor: A 750W rear hub motor (1310W peak) with 85Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.
technical.Battery: An integrated & removable 48V, 17.5Ah (840Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 85 miles on a single charge.** The XP4 is also certified to UL 2849.† Removing the battery from the frame is a breeze with the side-facing key port location.
technical.New: Keyless Riding: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only. We’ve listened to our loyal riders, and you can now ride key-free!
technical.TFT LCD Display: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port. You’ll find trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.
technical.Torque Sensor: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.
technical.Easy Charging: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP4 750 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 7-9 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in as little as 3.5 hours.
technical.Motor Controller: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

all.5 Riding Modes: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.

all.Rear Rack: A new rear rack design integrated into the bike frame holds up to 150lbs and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations. Add a LevelUp Rack (sold separately) on top of the rack to unlock even more accessory combinations!
all.Co-Pilot Capable: The LevelUp Rack (sold separately) can be added to the integrated rear rack and has a built-in mounting window to easily install children's seats like the Thule Maxx Yepp Seat. If they have outgrown a standard child seat, our Buddy Seat (sold separately) contains an open padded seat, handlebars, and foot pegs that allow you to bring them along for the ride!***

features.name: 5 Riding Modes
features.detail: Five riding modes deliver the speed and power to own the road as a Class 1, 2, or 3 eBike.* New simplified labels, including Eco, Tour, Sport, Sport+, & Turbo, allow riders to choose their riding experience.

features.name: Thumb Throttle
features.detail: An ergonomic below-the-bar trigger throttle on the left-hand side is easily engaged with your thumb while simultaneously eliminating joint fatigue.

features.name: Stealth M24 Motor
features.detail: A 750W rear hub motor (1310W peak) with 85Nm of torque supplies power and speed quicker than ever before. Stealth M24 technology delivers a quieter motor experience without sacrificing power.

features.name: Battery
features.detail: An integrated & removable 48V, 17.5Ah (840Wh) lithium-ion battery certified to UL 2271 makes for a clean design while powering your ride for up to 85 miles on a single charge.** The XP4 is also certified to UL 2849.† Removing the battery from the frame is a breeze with the side-facing key port location.

features.name: New: Keyless Riding
features.detail: Turn your bike on and off with the push of a button, and start riding without having the key in the battery! Keys are needed to remove the battery from the bike frame only. We’ve listened to our loyal riders, and you can now ride key-free!

features.name: Rear Rack
features.detail: A new rear rack design integrated into the bike frame holds up to 150lbs and features bosses for mounting various accessory combinations. Add a LevelUp Rack (sold separately) on top of the rack to unlock even more accessory combinations!

features.name: Co-Pilot Capable
features.detail: The LevelUp Rack (sold separately) can be added to the integrated rear rack and has a built-in mounting window to easily install children's seats like the Thule Maxx Yepp Seat. If they have outgrown a standard child seat, our Buddy Seat (sold separately) contains an open padded seat, handlebars, and foot pegs that allow you to bring them along for the ride!***

features.name: TFT LCD Display
features.detail: A custom color TFT display featuring a detachable mount and a USB-C port. You’ll find trip, battery, & power intelligence on the go. New intuitive drop-down menus make navigating the settings on your eBike easy to understand & allow users to customize their ride settings based on preference. The IP-X5-rated display ensures greater water resistance.

features.name: Tires—with Slime!
features.detail: Puncture-resistant 20” x 3” tires are perfect for mixed terrains and make for a smoother ride. The new custom tread pattern has less rolling resistance for better power efficiency and delivers an ultra-quiet experience. Slime is installed to prevent flat tires—at no additional cost.

features.name: Torque Sensor
features.detail: Our proprietary in-house-designed torque sensor programming will give you smoother power distribution and a better riding experience. It is designed to manage power output based on the rider’s pedaling effort. With this programming experience, riders can reach higher speeds easily and with more control than ever before.

features.name: Drivetrain
features.detail: An 11-32 tooth, 8-speed freewheel paired with a Shimano Altus derailleur and a below-the-bar trigger shifter allows you to swiftly change gears while riding to create pedaling efficiency and an easier riding experience at higher speeds.

features.name: Crankset
features.detail: Forged aluminum, 56-tooth custom chainring is the perfect ratio for effortless 20-inch wheel pedaling.

features.name: Chain
features.detail: A KMC Z8 steel chain with inner plate chamfering offers consistent tension and smooth transitions between shifting for a secure performance throughout your ride.

features.name: 602 Hydraulic Brakes
features.detail: Get ultimate stopping power with 602 hydraulic brakes paired with 180mm rotors (2.3mm thick), making it as easy to stop as it is to go, whether in wet or dry conditions. Paired with ergonomically designed aluminum brake levers for durability.

features.name: Safety Lights
features.detail: An integrated safety system, featuring a new bright 90-lumen headlamp with side amber lights and a brake-activated rear light powered by the internal battery, allows you to be seen at any time of day.

features.name: Turn Signals
features.detail: Alert drivers, riders, and people nearby with our turn signals. Simply use the left or right arrows on the button pad to turn on the blinkers on either side of the rear light.

features.name: Suspension Fork
features.detail: The front fork provides shock absorption for a smooth and comfortable ride. Adjust the tension or lock it out to tailor each ride to your preference based on payload capacity and weight distribution.

features.name: Folding Kickstand
features.detail: A heavy-duty steel side-sweeping kickstand located near the chainstay keeps the eBike upright.

features.name: Fenders
features.detail: Polypropylene fenders with a flared tail protect you and your ride from debris. The flexible material is damage-resistant and helps ensure long-term durability.

features.name: Quick-Release Pedals
features.detail: Custom-designed 6000 Series Aluminum quick-release pedals with splined inserts allow for easy, tool-free removal and installation. The new shape of the pedals improves foot traction for an optimal experience.

features.name: Lock-on Grips
features.detail: Full-length ergonomic lock-on grips add comfort so you can ride longer. The plastic sleeve inside helps lock the grips into place and also allows the grips to be easily removed.

features.name: Saddle
features.detail: A custom-designed saddle complements a sporty look while adding comfort so you can ride longer.

features.name: Adjustable Handlebar Stem
features.detail: Ride longer and more comfortably in an upright cruising position with our new zero-degree stem, which shortens the handlebar reach. Plus, telescoping functionality allows riders to reach a wide range of heights while maintaining comfort and stability.

features.name: Telescoping Seat Post
features.detail: Customize the bike to your perfect size by adjusting the seat post height; simply open the quick-release collar and slide the post to your preferred height and lock it in place by closing the collar.

features.name: Fully Foldable
features.detail: A foldable hinge at both the handlebar stem and frame guarantees your ride will fit into virtually any compact space. Remove the pedals and the seat post in seconds for easy and lightweight transport.

features.name: Weight
features.detail: Total bike weight is 62lbs without the battery installed. The XP4 long-range battery weighs 9lbs.

features.name: Easy Charging
features.detail: An auxiliary charging port near the bottom bracket provides riders with the option to charge the eBike without removing the battery. The XP4 750 comes standard with a 2amp charger for 7-9 hour charging, but a 5amp Fast Charger can be purchased separately, which can charge the long-range battery in as little as 3.5 hours.

features.name: Fully Redesigned Frame
features.detail: The newly designed, more aesthetic XP4 frame is lightweight and features sturdy 6000 series aluminum with mounting points for various accessory combinations.

features.name: Motor Controller
features.detail: 24amp internal controller is IP-X5 rated and potted for weatherproofing and thermal management.

features.name: Green Packaging
features.detail: Packaging components are biodegradable and easily recyclable.

features.detail: Tempest Grey

features.detail: Simply unfold the stem assembly, insert the stem & handlebars, and quickly attach the pedals and display screen.

features.name: Tested for Durability
features.detail: Our eBikes are built with industry-leading safety certifications so you can have peace of mind riding in almost any condition. A US-based bicycle testing lab put the XP4 through the rigorous ISO 4210 standard testing process.

features.name: Safety Certified
features.detail: We ensure that the electrical and battery components are manufactured to the industry standard. The Lectric XP4 is certified to UL 2849. Additionally, the XP4's lithium-ion battery is certified to UL 2271.
